Dimension: 70x140cm
Weight: 275g

***Please take note***
- Product may vary slightly from images due to the use of natural materials (e.g. wood, marble, and leather grains), or due to photoshoot lighting conditions and screen settings.
- Due to manual measurements, kindly allow 1-3cm of difference in the actual product.

metaData.Key Information:
Wrap your skin in cloud-soft comfort with the MOFUMOFU Microfiber Bath Towel.
Made from a microfiber blend (85% polyester, 15% nylon), this lightweight yet plush bath towel delivers exceptional absorbency while staying gentle on your skin.
The ultra-soft texture feels cosy and soothing, turning every wipe into a moment of calm.
Cool, refreshing, and quick-drying-perfect for daily use at home or on the go.
metaData.SAP Product Name: DREAMAX MOFUMOFU Bath Towel (70x140cm) - Blush Pink
metaData.Storage Information: Do not bleach. Do not iron. Do not dryclean. Machine washable with similar colours on normal setting. Wash separately before use. Cool tumble dry or spin dry.
